title: Image To Image Product Catalog Board AI
sourceTitle: Image To Image Product Catalog Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-end vertical product catalog board using plain white low-top sneaker reference as the exact product reference. Subject: plain white low-top sneaker with tonal laces and smooth leather upper preserves the uploaded product form, proportions, materials, and identity without redesign, shown as the top lifestyle hero product. Scene: Minimal architectural interior with textured plaster wall, subtle concrete or stone floor, warm neutral paper-like catalog background, and generous whitespace. Composition: Fixed vertical 3:4 catalog page: top lifestyle hero shot, bottom technical specification panel in a clean modular grid, side view, top view, heel close-up, sole detail, and leather texture close-up, 3-4 actual material swatches, and MATERIAL, DETAIL, USE CASE, DIMENSIONS. Signature Elements: Preserved image to image product catalog board source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Editorial product design catalog, high realism, warm muted color grading, architectural lifestyle photography, fine technical drawing system, and premium portfolio-board finish. Color Palette: Fixed warm neutral paper, muted red or sepia linework, plaster beige, concrete grey, product-derived material colors, and soft sunlight accents. Lighting: Natural side sunlight with soft but high-contrast shadows, realistic product highlights, and clean catalog readability. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Image To Image Product Catalog Board Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-end vertical product catalog board using compact matte black desk speaker reference as the exact product reference. Subject: compact matte black desk speaker with metal grille, rubber base, and rounded rectangular body preserves the uploaded product form, proportions, materials, and identity without redesign, shown as the top lifestyle hero product. Scene: Minimal architectural interior with textured plaster wall, subtle concrete or stone floor, warm neutral paper-like catalog background, and generous whitespace. Composition: Fixed vertical 3:4 catalog page: top lifestyle hero shot, bottom technical specification panel in a clean modular grid, front view, side profile, exploded grille detail, control button close-up, and cable-port diagram, 3-4 actual material swatches, and ACOUSTICS, MATERIAL, CONTROLS, SCALE. Signature Elements: Preserved image to image product catalog board source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Editorial product design catalog, high realism, warm muted color grading, architectural lifestyle photography, fine technical drawing system, and premium portfolio-board finish. Color Palette: Fixed warm neutral paper, muted red or sepia linework, plaster beige, concrete grey, product-derived material colors, and soft sunlight accents. Lighting: Natural side sunlight with soft but high-contrast shadows, realistic product highlights, and clean catalog readability. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
